description: Mexican criminal organization and U.S.-designated Foreign Terrorist Organization that splintered from Los Zetas in 2015. Based in Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, it engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, human trafficking, and money laundering. It has operational presence in the United States, Guatemala, Honduras, and Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: In the latter, it is believed that they took away the cocaine purchasing business from Los Zetas...
country_links.context: The Cártel del Noreste took away the cocaine purchasing business from Los Zetas in Colombia.
